prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: runtime isometric tactics prop with transparent background. Primary request: create a volcanic cave-mouth prop for the overworld exploration view. Scene/background: transparent background for a runtime isometric tactics prop. Subject: a natural volcanic cave mouth embedded in jagged dark basalt, recessed black opening, faint ember glow within, wide stone shoulders, grounded base. Style/medium: stylized painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D game prop matching the solemn late-90s / early-2000s science-fantasy tactics terrain and props already approved for Renations Tactics. Composition/framing: centered, nearly bilateral silhouette, wide enough to read as roughly three overworld tiles, readable at small tactical scale, tight bounds, anchored to the ground plane, rotation-tolerant. Lighting/mood: dim overcast exterior with subtle ember warmth inside the cave. Color palette: dark basalt gray, ash brown, moss-muted earth, ember orange, pale gold accents only in the glow. Materials/textures: heavy basalt rock, weathered stone, ash-dark recess, no polished surfaces. Constraints: transparent background; no characters; no text; no extra scenery; no floating silhouette; designed to sit convincingly on a 96x48 isometric tile board around 140-160px tall in scene. Avoid: strict left-facing side view, strict right-facing side view, mine tunnel timber framing, cartoon exaggeration, anime look, glossy 3D, photorealism, clutter, oversized empty padding.
